title: More Developers =/= Faster? Why Teams DON'T Scale! #shorts
summary: Adding more developers to teams does not necessarily accelerate output due to communication overhead and coordination complexity. Effective scaling requires smart team organization rather than simply increasing headcount.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof argues that adding developers to a team does not reliably increase output, because communication overhead and coordination complexity grow as headcount rises. The takeaway: effective scaling depends on smart team organization rather than raw headcount.
